embeddedSqlUnits.text: delete from hsgptf where GPT_KZL = :G7100P and GPT_CNR = :G7305A and GPT_FNR = :G7306A
select G78_TXT into :reptxt from HSG78F where G78_KZL = :G73000 And G78_CNR = :G73050 And G78_FNR = :G73060 And G78_WNR = :G73065
update HSG75F set G75_failNo = :SUB060A, G75_UPLTIME = null where g75_kzl = :G73000 And G75_claimNo = :G73050 and G75_failNo = :G73060
close ct
declare ct Cursor for select GPT_TXT from HSGPTF where GPT_KZL = :G71000 and GPT_CNR = :G71050 and GPT_FNR = :G7306A order by GPT_ZNR
open ct
fetch next from ct into :record_t
close ct
fetch next from ct into :record_t
close ct
delete from hsgptf where GPT_KZL = :G71000 and GPT_CNR = :G71050 and GPT_FNR = :G7306A AND GPT_ZNR = :count
update hsgptf set gpt_txt = :TEXT where GPT_KZL = :G71000 and GPT_CNR = :G71050 and GPT_FNR = :G7306A AND GPT_ZNR = :count
INSERT INTO HSGPTF (GPT_KZL, GPT_CNR, GPT_FNR, GPT_WNR, GPT_ZNR, GPT_TXT) VALUES(:G71000, :G71050, :G7306A, :G73065, :count, :text)
declare c4 Cursor for select AHK080, AHK620 from HSAHKPF where AHK000 = :G71000 and AHK010 = :G71010 and AHK020 = :G71020 and AHK030 = ' ' and AHK040 = :G71030 and AHK050 = :G71190
open c4
fetch next from c4 into :dates
close c4
SELECT LISTAGG(FTM_MT_COD, ', ') into :result FROM HSFTMF WHERE ftm_wkowo = :workOrderFull

SELECT LISTAGG(DISTINCT DIGITS(AHW075)), LISTAGG(DISTINCT DIGITS(AHW075)) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY AHW075) AS AHW075 into :Positions.List FROM ( SELECT AHW000, AHW010, AHW020, AHW075 FROM HSAHWPF UNION SELECT AHP000 AS AHW000, AHP010 AS AHW010, AHP020 AS AHW020, AHP075 AS AHW075 FROM HSAHPPF ) AS AHW JOIN HSG71PF ON AHW000 = G71000 AND AHW010 = G71010 AND AHW020 = G71020 WHERE G71000 = :dealerId AND G71050 = :claimNo AND AHW075 > 0
